title: Audit READMEs for all 13 public-facing repos
description: All 13 repos linked from joeblack.nyc now get traffic. Audit each for: clear description, badges, install/usage instructions, and accurate links. Repos: agent-marketplace, codex-review-bot, jobsearch-tracker, ext-tool, resume-builder, rpi-cluster-bootstrap, quart-sqlalchemy, coinaddr, pricing, cookiecutter-uv, cookiecutter-ds, couchdiscover. (helpers is now consolidated)

title: Add deprecation notice and archive idea-nursery repo
description: idea-nursery GitHub repo still has 6 open issues pointing to the old home. Add a deprecation notice to its README pointing to agent-marketplace, comment on each issue, then decide whether to archive the repo.

title: Update helpers project card GitHub link to nursery/
description: The helpers/idea-nursery project card in site/index.html links to agent-marketplace/tree/main/projects — update to nursery/ after the rename.

title: Fix nursery/ paths in GitHub issues #1-6
description: Issues #1-6 on agent-marketplace were created with projects/ paths before the rename to nursery/. Update issue bodies to point to nursery/<name>/ paths instead.

title: Add tests for claude-switcher (claude-use.zsh)
description:
claude-use.zsh now has meaningful functionality (launchctl setenv, JSONC inline comment stripping, profile switching, status output, clear command) but zero tests. Add a test suite to verify all major behaviors so future changes can be made confidently.

Test coverage needed:
- _cu_persist_launchctl: sets vars via launchctl setenv, clears via unsetenv
- _cu_persist_vscode_env: JSONC stripping preserves string literals containing //, trailing comma removal, correct JSON output
- cu status: shows launchctl state (vertex / oauth token / none)
- cu clear: clears shell env AND launchctl vars
- Profile loading: vertex profile sets VERTEX keys, clears OAuth; OAuth profile sets token, clears VERTEX keys
- Array subscript fix: _cu_env[] works without quotes

title: Decide openclaw-setup secrets architecture
description: openclaw-setup has a complex secrets pipeline via 1Password + launchd. Open question: does this belong in the public nursery or a private repo? Decision affects whether it can be promoted publicly.

title: Verify obsidian-user-base bootstrap end-to-end
description: The 'just bootstrap' command in nursery/obsidian-user-base hasn't been run end-to-end since adoption. Verify paths are correct for Obsidian Vault and _wiki/ locations after the projects/ → nursery/ rename and repo move.

title: Replace placeholder writing links with real article URLs
description: The Writing section in site/index.html has 3 articles all linking to the Medium homepage. Wire up real URLs once articles are published, or replace with actual published pieces.

title: Run article idea extractor across Claude Code sessions
description: The extractor prompt lives at docs/idea-article_extractor.md. Run it against ~/.claude/projects/ session files and write output to docs/article-ideas.jsonl and docs/article-ideas-summary.md.
